methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: Total collateral shares must equal the sum of all individual user collateral shares.
invariants.attack_scenario: If totalCollateralShare is less than the sum of user shares, the last users to withdraw will be unable to retrieve their collateral, leading to insolvency.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_totalCollateral() public view { assert(totalCollateralShare == sumUserCollateral()); }

invariants.description: Total borrow base must equal the sum of all individual user borrow parts.
invariants.attack_scenario: If totalBorrow.base is out of sync with user borrow parts, interest accrual and debt repayment math will be corrupted, either trapping user funds or allowing debt evasion.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_totalBorrowBase() public view { assert(totalBorrow.base == sumUserBorrowParts()); }

invariants.description: The actual token balances of the MagicLP pool must always be greater than or equal to the tracked reserves.
invariants.attack_scenario: If reserves exceed actual balances, the pool is insolvent and users will fail to withdraw their liquidity.

invariants.description: The total staking token balance tracked by the contract must equal the sum of unlocked and locked supplies.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the tracked balance diverges from the supplies, users could be credited for tokens that don't exist, draining the reward pool or stealing other users' principal.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_stakingBalance() public view { assert(stakingTokenBalance == unlockedSupply + lockedSupply); }

invariants.description: The effective total supply for rewards must correctly apply the locking boost multiplier to the locked supply.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the total supply calculation is flawed, rewards will be distributed disproportionately, diluting fair stakers or over-rewarding attackers.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_totalSupplyRatio() public view { assert(totalSupply() == unlockedSupply + (lockedSupply * lockingBoostMultiplerInBips / 10000)); }

invariants.description: The total elastic amount (liabilities) of a token must be fully backed by the actual token balance plus the strategy balance.
invariants.attack_scenario: If liabilities exceed assets, the vault is insolvent. A bank run would leave the last withdrawers with nothing.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_degenBoxSolvency(IERC20 token) public view { assert(totals[token].elastic <= token.balanceOf(address(this)) + strategyData[token].balance); }

invariants.description: The total base (shares) of a token must equal the sum of all individual user balances for that token.
invariants.attack_scenario: If total shares do not match user balances, the share-to-amount exchange rate will be manipulated, allowing attackers to steal yield or principal.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_degenBoxShares(IERC20 token) public view { assert(totals[token].base == sumUserBalances(token)); }

invariants.description: The total amount of a token deposited must equal the sum of locked and unlocked amounts.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the totals are out of sync, users might bypass locks or withdraw more than they deposited, draining the bootstrapping pool.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_onboardingTotals(address token) public view { assert(totals[token].total == totals[token].unlocked + totals[token].locked); }

invariants.description: The stored reward per token for any given reward token must be monotonically increasing.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the reward per token decreases, users' earned rewards would shrink, effectively stealing past yield from stakers.

invariants.description: A user must remain solvent after any borrow or removeCollateral action.
invariants.attack_scenario: If a user can bypass the solvency check, they can extract more value than their collateral is worth, leaving the protocol with bad debt.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_userSolvencyAfterAction(address user) public view { assert(isSolvent(user)); }
